error: Factorio 0.13 interpreted the absolute --benchmark path as a save name, prefixed user/saves, appended .zip, and failed to open the resulting invalid path
root_cause: Factorio 0.13 --benchmark addresses saves by name relative to write-data/saves rather than accepting the absolute save paths supported by later target binaries.
fix: For Factorio 0.13, stage the exact created save under write-data/saves and pass its basename to --benchmark.
regression: Test-MIRPowerShellQuality requires an explicit Factorio 0.13 benchmarkMap staging boundary.
candidate_implication: The 1.3.0 candidate requires a corrected retention rerun and fresh seal; no published version is affected.
